Pebbles Ai

Pebbles Ai

📌

Hey Product Hunt! 🙋🏻‍♂️

My name is Dmytro Antoniuk, and I'm the Chief AI Officer at Pebbles Ai. I'm incredibly excited to introduce Pebbles Ai to the community today.

What are we solving?

Getting your first customers is the hardest part. You instantly get pulled in many different directions: market research, finding target leads, writing cold outreach, and managing follow-ups. [...] What is the solution?

Pebbles Ai brings your strategy, audience targeting, and outreach into a single, connected loop. It combines advanced neurosymbolic AI with real B2B growth expertise so teams can work together in one place.

 Learns your product and tone of voice from your brand docs, so you never re-explain your business
 Reads B2B market signals to find your ideal customers and split them into clear segments
 Acts like an in-house strategy consultancy and content agency in one
 Crafts multi-touch campaigns tailored to each segment automatically
 Keeps your data private in tenant-isolated architecture (CASA II certified)

results.content:

1yr ago

Image 19: Anand Chowdhary

Anand Chowdhary

Image 20: FirstQuadrant FirstQuadrant

Maker

tl;dr:After 2½ years of building and rebuilding, @carlobadini and I are finally opening up access to FirstQuadrant, an AI sales execution platform that helps founders & sales teams stay organized, follow up on time, and actually move deals forward.

It doesn't try to replace your reps... think of it more like a super sharp assistant that keeps track of what needs to happen next and just gets it done: follow-ups, meeting reschedules, lead qualification, post-call tasks, and more - all handled in the background. We put together a PH-only offer with 15% off for the first year and a few extra perks for early supporters.

Would love to hear what you think! [...] Launched in 2025

Image 63: B2B Rocket

B2B Rocket

Supercharge Your Sales & book new revenue with AI

4.8(69 reviews) [...] FirstQuadrant is an AI-powered sales execution platform. But it’s important to clarify right away: we are not an AI agent or an AI SDR. In fact, we intentionally distance ourselves from that idea. 

We don’t think LLMs— now or even in the future — are smart enough to fully manage something as complex and human as sales. It’s a process that needs empathy, nuance, and real human judgment.

That’s why our core design ethos is building human-centered AI.

Think of FirstQuadrant an AI sales assistant and not a replacement. A platform that works alongside your team. It’s built to help revenue teams move faster, stay more organized, and ultimately close more deals. By taking care of all the busywork they shouldn’t have to do in the first place.
